tests.journey: A logged-in user uploads a JSON file to create a named data dictionary and verifies it appears in settings.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in and on the settings page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a JSON dictionary file named 'E2E JSON Dictionary'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Dictionary is saved and shown in settings

tests.journey: A logged-in user uploads an XLSX file to create a named data dictionary and verifies it appears in settings.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in and on the settings page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads an xlsx dictionary file named 'E2E XLSX Dictionary'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Dictionary is saved and shown in settings

tests.test_name: Create dictionary manually without importing a file
tests.journey: A logged-in user manually creates a dictionary with a single term and definition, then verifies it is saved in settings.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Create dictionary manually without importing a file
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in and on the settings page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User creates a dictionary named 'Manual Dictionary' with term 'TC' defined as 'Test Case'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Dictionary is saved and shown in settings

tests.journey: A logged-in user renames an existing saved dictionary and verifies the new name is reflected in settings.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in with a saved dictionary named 'E2E Edit Name Dictionary'
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User renames the dictionary to 'E2E Renamed Dictionary'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Dictionary named 'E2E Renamed Dictionary' is visible

tests.journey: A logged-in user edits the term entries of an existing dictionary and verifies the updated entries are saved.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in with a saved dictionary named 'E2E Edit Entries Dictionary'
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User edits the dictionary entries to set term 'BDD' defined as 'Behaviour Driven Development'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Dictionary is saved and shown in settings

tests.journey: A logged-in user marks a saved dictionary as the default and verifies the default flag is applied.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in with a saved dictionary named 'E2E Default Dictionary'
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User marks the dictionary as default

tests.test_name: Changing the default dictionary clears the previous default
tests.journey: A logged-in user sets a new dictionary as default and verifies the previously defaulted dictionary is no longer marked as default.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Changing the default dictionary clears the previous default
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in with two saved dictionaries, 'E2E Old Default' already marked as default
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User marks 'E2E New Default' as the default dictionary
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: 'E2E New Default' is marked as default and 'E2E Old Default' is not marked as default

tests.test_name: Upload an unsupported file format shows an import error
tests.journey: A logged-in user attempts to upload a dictionary file in an unsupported format and receives a descriptive import error.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Upload an unsupported file format shows an import error
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in and on the settings page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a file with an unsupported format
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Import error containing 'Unsupported file type' is displayed

tests.test_name: Upload a malformed JSON file shows an import error
tests.journey: A logged-in user uploads a structurally invalid JSON dictionary file and receives a descriptive parse error.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Upload a malformed JSON file shows an import error
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in and on the settings page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a malformed JSON dictionary file
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Import error containing 'Invalid JSON' is displayed

tests.test_name: Upload a JSON with too many entries shows an import error
tests.journey: A logged-in user uploads a JSON dictionary that exceeds the maximum entry count and receives an error citing the 500-entry limit.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Upload a JSON with too many entries shows an import error
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in and on the settings page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a JSON dictionary with too many entries
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Import error containing 'may not exceed 500 entries' is displayed

tests.test_name: Upload an oversized XLSX file shows an import error
tests.journey: A logged-in user uploads an XLSX dictionary file exceeding the allowed size limit and receives a file size error.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Upload an oversized XLSX file shows an import error
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in and on the settings page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads an oversized XLSX dictionary file
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Import error containing 'File too large' is displayed

tests.test_name: Create dictionary manually with multiple terms
tests.journey: A logged-in user manually creates a dictionary containing multiple terms and verifies it is saved in settings.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Create dictionary manually with multiple terms
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in and on the settings page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User creates a dictionary named 'E2E Multi-Term Dict' with multiple terms
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Dictionary is saved and shown in settings

tests.test_name: Duplicate dictionary name shows an error
tests.journey: A logged-in user attempts to upload a second dictionary with the same name as an existing one and receives a duplicate name error.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Duplicate dictionary name shows an error
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in, on settings page, and has already uploaded a dictionary named 'E2E Duplicate Test'
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads another JSON dictionary file named 'E2E Duplicate Test'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Duplicate dictionary name error is displayed

tests.journey: A logged-in user exports a saved dictionary in JSON format and verifies a .json file is downloaded.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in with a saved dictionary named 'E2E Export JSON'
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User exports the dictionary as JSON
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A file with extension '.json' is downloaded

tests.journey: A logged-in user exports a saved dictionary in Excel format and verifies a .xlsx file is downloaded.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in with a saved dictionary named 'E2E Export Excel'
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User exports the dictionary as Excel
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A file with extension '.xlsx' is downloaded

tests.journey: A logged-in user deletes an existing saved dictionary and verifies it is no longer listed in settings.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in with a saved dictionary named 'E2E Delete Dictionary'

tests.journey: A user on the Analyze page supplies a dictionary file inline and verifies it overrides the default dictionary for the current analysis session only.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User supplies a dictionary file in the analysis panel
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: That dictionary is used for the current analysis only
